target.title: test(scripts): update helper route expectations
target.body:
## Summary
- Update the `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` route expectation in `src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`.
- Include the current helper importers that now resolve through the tooling Vitest project.

## What Problem This Solves
`checks-node-core-tooling` failed on `#94084` after rebasing onto current main because `buildVitestRunPlans(["test/helpers/temp-dir.ts"])` returned additional importer tests that were not listed in the expected tooling include patterns.

The failing CI assertion showed new `test/scripts/*` importers for the top-level temp-dir helper, so the fixture had drifted behind current main.

## Evidence
The failed CI job reported:

```text
FAIL src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts > test-projects args > routes top-level test helpers to importing repo tests
+ "test/scripts/e2e-text-file-utils.test.ts"
+ "test/scripts/incremental-line-reader.test.ts"
```

A focused local run on this branch then exposed the full current delta and passes after adding all missing importer tests.

## Tests and validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/scripts/test-projects.test.ts --testNamePattern="routes top-level test helpers to importing repo tests"`
- `git diff --check`

## Risk checklist
- [x] Test-only fixture update.
- [x] No runtime behavior changes.
- [x] Scope is limited to the stale helper routing expectation.

## Current review state
Ready for maintainer review.
